text:
うむ、どうだった？
なかなかの陳列内容だっただろう。

陳列内容もさることながら
いつでもどこでも呼び出せる
というのが人気の秘密だろうな。

せっかくのショップなのだから
上手い具合に利用してみせてこその
アークスというものだろう！
いいか、私もＡＣショップには

So! What did ya think? It's got a pretty nice
lineup, don't it?

The lineup's one thing, but the real secret to
its popularity is that you can look at it
anytime, anywhere.

It's a pretty great shop, so you can't
call yourself an ARKS op if you don't
put it to good use!

Now did I ever tell ya the story about the time
I bought somethin' from the AC Shop
for my first main squeeze...
